strengths: 15+ years technical experience across web, infrastructure, and data platforms with consistent focus on testing and code quality
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain production systems at scale (Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/sec, Optilyz processing millions of mails annually)
Track record of knowledge sharing through workshops, open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and conference talks
concerns: Only 6 months exposure to AI work (at current re:cinq role); zero demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms—the core 'preferred' qualification for AI Strategy specialization
Resume shows technical execution focus (building and optimizing systems), not strategic positioning required for advising on future cloud/AI platforms or identifying differentiation opportunities
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership: current title is Staff Engineer, GISCollective is open-source/niche project with no P&L or enterprise advisory responsibilities
response.justification: This is a skilled technical craftsperson with broad systems engineering experience, but the role requires a director-level AI strategist with proven expertise building AI-driven products and advising enterprise customers on cloud/AI platform futures. The candidate's AI exposure is recent and infrastructure-focused (6 months), with no demonstrated AI products, zero strategic customer advisory background, and experience positioned at execution rather than strategic direction-setting. The 15-year tenure and craftsmanship rigor are assets, but they do not address the core gap: this position needs recognized AI expertise and director-level strategic influence, neither of which appear in the resume.
